title: Digital%20IDs%20Addis%20Ababa%20Case%20Study
content:
/CASE STUD Y
ADDIS ABABA CITY CIVIL 
STATUS DOCUMENT 
REGISTRATION SYSTEM 
(CSDRS)The biometric system improved 
Identity management for Addis 
Ababa  and streamlined civil 
registration processes

The Addis Ababa City Administration is a government executive organ of 
Addis Ababa, the capital of Ethiopia. It is governed by mayor, and the 
lowest administrative unit is the woreda, led by a woreda administrator. 
As a federal structure the woreda administration has an elected council.
Enrolment and Identi/f_ication Application with online and oﬄine 
features 
• The windows-based Registration module consists of capturing the 
photo, /f_ingerprints / IRIS, Signature and supporting documents 
along with the required demographic details. 
• It facilitates the user to capture demographic data and biometric 
data of the Applicant, the biometric data will contain the prints (ten 
prints) and it allows searchers to carry out a search and analysis of 
/f_ingerprint which are stored at a centralized database. Also, for the 
Applicants who have the problem while capturing /f_ingerprints, the 
Application gives the provision to capture IRIS. 
• Oﬄine Enrolment feature enables the system to work oﬄine when 
there is no connectivity with central server. Registration data in 
encrypted format will be stored in local database and will be synced 
to central DB once connection establishes to central server. 
CSDRS Web Module 
• The web-based module is a web application which enables users to 
manage user administration module, Issuance, and maintenance of 
the Service Certi/f_icates. 
• An administrator can create, update, and assign roles to the users, 
this module also provides the con/f_iguration of master data for the 
application like adding Sub City, Woreda, Services, Service 
Categories, Hospital names, court names, Region names, Country 
names etc. All the Issuance of diﬀerent types of Service Certi/f_icates 
are entered, deleted, maintained, printed through this module, this 
application also contains reports module which generates dynamic 
reports.Cust omer:
Public SectorIndustry:

 Quick Shee t
SolutionThe Addis Ababa City Administration is a government executive 
organ of Addis Ababa, the capital of Ethiopia. It is governed by 
mayor, and the lowest administrative unit is the woreda, led by a 
woreda administrator. As a federal structure the woreda adminis-
tration has an elected council.
An Enrolment and Identi/f_ication Application that captures 
biometric and demographic data, including /f_ingerprints and iris 
scans, for centralized storage and analysis. It supports oﬄine 
enrolment, encrypted data syncing, and a web module for user 
administration, service certi/f_icate issuance, master data 
con/f_iguration, and dynamic report generation, ensuring seamless 
identity management.
• Issuance of Resident ID Card for residents.
• Issuance of Birth Certi/f_icate for Citizens
• Issuance of Death Certi/f_icate for Citizens 
• Issuance of Non-Marital Certi/f_icate for Citizens 
• Issuance of Marriage Certi/f_icate for Citizens 
• Issuance of Divorce Certi/f_icate for Citizens 
• Document Authentication and Veri/f_ication 
• Various reports for application.
• API- Enables sharing data of residents and non-residents 
registered in the system with the partners.

Module 
• The CSDRS will enable Addis Ababa citizens to establish identity, 
parental relationship, inheritance, and citizenship, and provide 
eligibility data for social bene/f_its and status-related items- 
Marital Status, Birth, Death and Divorce. In addition, the system 
will issue Birth, Death, Non-Marital, Marriage and Divorce status 
certi/f_icates to residents of Addis Ababa. 
• Registration of Residents
• Capturing of /f_ingerprints and veri/f_ication of /f_ingerprints using 
bio-metric technology for all registered Addis Ababa residents.
• Centralized Card Printing with multi printer support to issue 
Resident ID Card with single and Batch ID Card printing option.
• Quality Assurance module for Printer Cards
• Stock Management module to manage the availability of stocks.
• Card Dispatch and Delivery module to deliver printed ID cards to 
the residents.
• Registration of births, marriages, divorce, non-marital and deaths 
of Addis Ababa Residents and non-residents.
• Production and provision of status certi/f_icates for births, 
marriages, divorce, non-marital and deaths.
• Provision of user administration and general support to Civil 
Status Document Registration Services.Key Bene/f_its Experienced by 
Customer and stakeholders
• Issuance of Resident ID Card for residents.
• Issuance of Birth Certi/f_icate for Citizens
• Issuance of Death Certi/f_icate for Citizens
